description:
Modding platform for GI, HSR, WW and ZZZ

Features
  One Ring — Allows to launch and manage all supported Model Importers in unified and convenient way
  Plug-and-Play — Configures any supported game and installs its XXMI instance automatically
  Custom Launch — Can be configured to start game in almost every possible way via Advanced Settings
  Automatic Updates — Always keeps XXMI instances and itself up-to date
  Safe to Use — Verifies authenticity of XXMI libraries and own downloads
Supported Model Importers
  WWMI - Wuthering Waves Model Importer GitHub
  ZZMI - Zenless Zone Zero Model Importer GitHub
  SRMI - Honkai: Star Rail Model Importer GitHub
  GIMI - Genshin Impact Model Importer GitHubs
Additions
  [Model Importers]: Added process Start Method option to General Settings with 2 options: Native (old method) and Shell (may work better for some corrupted OS).
  [WWMI]: Added support for Steam Launch Options macro to directly start game with WWMI via Play button on Steam (e.g. "C:\Games\XXMI Launcher\Resources\Bin\XXMI Launcher.exe" && %command%).
  [Launcher]: Added "Appreciation Corners" listing active dev team for every Model Importer and their pay respect links.
Adjustments
  [GIMI]: Shell Start Method is now default for GIMI (since it's less likely to trigger GI Anti-Cheat).
Improvements
  [Settings]: Minor GUI improvements.
Bugfixes
  [Settings]: Fixed input filter errors for Start Behaviour - Timeout Launcher Settings field.
